title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A comprehensive monthly AI news recap covering Google Remy agent, Boston Dynamics Atlas upgrade, DeepSeek price cuts, Anthropic's Mythos 1, Grok 5, and other developments. The video emphasizes a broader trend toward AI agents capable of autonomous work, coding, and physical robotics integration rather than question-answering systems.
